scripts.test:e2e:listings:strict: E2E_STRICT_LISTINGS=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REQUIRE_SEED=1 env -u NO_COLOR playwright test tests/e2e/listings_flow_strict.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:lifecycle:strict: E2E_STRICT_LIFECYCLE=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REQUIRE_SEED=1 env -u NO_COLOR playwright test tests/e2e/lifecycle_archive_flow_strict.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:lifecycle:entities:strict: E2E_STRICT_LIFECYCLE=1 PLAYWRIGHT_REQUIRE_SEED=1 env -u NO_COLOR playwright test tests/e2e/lifecycle_entities_strict.spec.ts
scripts.test:qa: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
